description: Consolidated Colab benchmark exports for REMIX-FND_v2. Each run folder contains manifest.json plus eval JSON; .pt files may exist locally but are gitignored.

runs.notes: 5 epoch baseline, 3 epoch DANN. Weighted F1 ~85.47% DANN — matches manuscript Table 4 / B (primary veracity). No ood_domains / paper_components in this export.
3 epoch baseline, 2 epoch DANN. Includes ood_domains.json and paper_components_probe.json. Baseline differs from 20260321 (separate training).
3 epoch baseline, 2 epoch DIML (train_diml.py). Includes ood_domains.json and paper_components_probe.json. Started ~5s before 20260322T135702Z_dann on Colab.
